app.name: MCPProxy
app.one_liner: An open-source desktop application that super-charges AI agents with intelligent tool discovery, massive token savings, and built-in security quarantine against malicious MCP servers.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: Provides an overview of active MCP servers, agent tokens, and activity metrics with drill-down navigation.

screens.name: Security Quarantine
screens.purpose: Review and manually approve new MCP servers before they are exposed to AI agents.

screens.name: Upstream Servers
screens.purpose: Manage connected MCP servers, view their status, and approve new ones from quarantine.

rust_commands.name: approve_mcp_server
rust_commands.purpose: Approve a quarantined MCP server, allowing its tools to be exposed to AI agents.

rust_commands.name: install_native_binaries
rust_commands.purpose: Install core server and system tray app to system directories and configure PATH.

rust_commands.name: sync_server_state
rust_commands.purpose: Emit servers.changed event to synchronize UI after tool approval or server updates.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add quarantine mechanism for unapproved servers
week 1: Build system-tray UI with server status indicators
week 1: Implement core proxy logic for MCP tool routing
week 2: Add telemetry for setup funnel analytics
week 2: Develop onboarding wizard with import workflow
week 2: Integrate dynamic tool discovery via retrieve_tools
week 3: Add real-time server state synchronization
week 3: Package native installers for macOS, Windows, Linux
acceptance_tests: After approving a quarantined MCP server, the UI immediately reflects the updated server state without manual refresh.
Docker-based MCP servers recover properly after restart when MCPProxy runs as a macOS launchd service.
Native installers correctly place binaries in Program Files (Windows) or Applications (macOS) and add MCPProxy to system PATH.
OAuth authentication works reliably for Runlayer-backed MCP servers without regression.
The system tray displays accurate counts of active upstream servers matching the submenu contents.
